name: drupal/dkan_mcp_server
description: Exposes DKAN tools through the contrib mcp_server base, with per-tool Drupal-permission access control. Bundles the shared dkan_query_tools library as a submodule.

suggest.drupal/simple_oauth: OAuth 2.1 bearer-token auth for the MCP HTTP endpoint (^6). Without it the endpoint relies on basic_auth, which the install hook disables by default.
suggest.e0ipso/simple_oauth_21: OAuth 2.1 conformance + RFC 9728 protected-resource metadata (^1). Pairs with drupal/simple_oauth.
